# Koala UI

> An Angular component library in the style of shadcn/ui.
> Components are copied directly into your project via the Koala CLI.

## Docs

- [Get Started](https://koalarx.com/docs/get-started.md): Installation and setup
- [Alert](https://koalarx.com/docs/alert.md): Alert component
- [Breadcrumb](https://koalarx.com/docs/breadcrumb.md): Breadcrumb component
- [Button](https://koalarx.com/docs/button.md): Button component
- [Calendar](https://koalarx.com/docs/calendar.md): Calendar component
- [Checkbox](https://koalarx.com/docs/checkbox.md): Checkbox component
- [Collapse](https://koalarx.com/docs/collapse.md): Collapse component
- [Combobox](https://koalarx.com/docs/combobox.md): Combobox component
- [Confirm](https://koalarx.com/docs/confirm.md): Confirm component
- [Data Table](https://koalarx.com/docs/datatable.md): Data Table component
- [Dropdown](https://koalarx.com/docs/dropdown.md): Dropdown component
- [Fieldset](https://koalarx.com/docs/fieldset.md): Fieldset component
- [Filter](https://koalarx.com/docs/filter.md): Filter component
- [Input CNPJ](https://koalarx.com/docs/input-cnpj.md): Input CNPJ component
- [Input CPF](https://koalarx.com/docs/input-cpf.md): Input CPF component
- [Input Currency](https://koalarx.com/docs/input-currency.md): Input Currency component
- [Input Field](https://koalarx.com/docs/input-field.md): Input Field component
- [Loading](https://koalarx.com/docs/loading.md): Loading component
- [Modal](https://koalarx.com/docs/modal.md): Modal component
- [Pagination](https://koalarx.com/docs/pagination.md): Pagination component
- [Radio](https://koalarx.com/docs/radio.md): Radio component
- [Range](https://koalarx.com/docs/range.md): Range component
- [Select](https://koalarx.com/docs/select.md): Select component
- [Side Window](https://koalarx.com/docs/side-window.md): Side Window component
- [Skeleton](https://koalarx.com/docs/skeleton.md): Skeleton component
- [Stepper](https://koalarx.com/docs/stepper.md): Stepper component
- [Table](https://koalarx.com/docs/table.md): Table component
- [Tabs](https://koalarx.com/docs/tabs.md): Tabs component
- [Textarea](https://koalarx.com/docs/textarea.md): Textarea component
- [Toast](https://koalarx.com/docs/toast.md): Toast component
- [Toggle](https://koalarx.com/docs/toggle.md): Toggle component
- [Tooltip](https://koalarx.com/docs/tooltip.md): Tooltip component
- [Validator](https://koalarx.com/docs/validator.md): Validator component

## CLI

```bash
# Install CLI
bun add -g @koalarx/ui-cli

# Create project
kl new -n my-app

# Add components
kl install -n button,modal,dropdown
```
